text: Refine economic logic: variance and time horizon estimation
description:
Current economic model uses fixed 5% discount rate per cost unit. Enhance to support:
- Variance in cost/value estimates (uncertainty modeling)
- Time horizon estimation (when will returns arrive?)
- Temporal discounting based on actual time-to-completion, not just cost
- Aims returning investment sooner should be visibly more attractive due to cost of capital/interest

status.comment: Implemented duration-based temporal discounting, variance modeling, and cost of capital
